---
title: "Public Health Summary Report"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  eval: false
---

# Purpose

This Quarto file is a preliminary reporting template for a future script-based workflow. It does not replace the notebook report yet.

# Planned Inputs

- Raw workbook under `data/`
- Summary table generated by the notebook
- PNG figures generated under `outputs/figures/`

# Planned Outputs

- HTML report
- Summary table references
- Figure references and interpretation text

# Notes

The current main report remains:

```text
notebooks/generate_public_health_summary_table.ipynb
```

Future work can move notebook logic into `src/` modules and render this Quarto report from the generated outputs.
